metadata.description: Marketplace hosting the kiho plugin — a single-entry multi-agent orchestration harness for Claude Code.

plugins.name: kiho
plugins.description: Single-entry multi-agent orchestration harness for Claude Code. A Ralph-style CEO agent runs a per-turn autonomous loop over a project's plan.md, delegating to department leads, committees, and vendored skills; backed by a three-tier storage doctrine (Tier-1 markdown canonical, Tier-2 JSONL/YAML/TOML processing, Tier-3 on-demand sqlite/embeddings), a live org registry and capability matrix, a two-tier Karpathy-style knowledge base gated by a sole kb-manager agent, and a declarative cycle-runner kernel executing TOML lifecycle templates. Single user entry point: /kiho.
